versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   msr-4-13-2                      true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: msr
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: msr-4-13-2
      name: msr
      namespace: msr

examples.title: With Ingress
examples.installHtml:
helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install msr oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=msr:4.13.2" \
  -n kcm-system
examples.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   msr-4-13-2                      true
examples.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: msr
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: msr
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: msr-4-13-2
      name: msr
      namespace: msr
      values: |
        msr:
          expose:
            type: ingress
            tls:
              enabled: true
              certSource: secret
              secret:
                secretName: "wildcard-tls"
            ingress:
              controller: default
              hosts:
                core: msr4.example.url
          externalURL: msr4.example.url
examples.contentHtml:
Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install traefik oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=traefik:39.0.5" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install msr oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=msr:4.13.2" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   traefik-39-0-5                  true
# kcm-system   msr-4-13-2                      true

Deploy service template

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: msr
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: traefik-39-0-5
      name: traefik
      namespace: msr
      values: |
        traefik:
          deployment:
            kind: DaemonSet
          ports:
            web:
              port: 8000
              hostPort: 80
            websecure:
              port: 8443
              hostPort: 443
    - template: msr-4-13-2
      name: msr
      namespace: msr
      values: |
        msr:
          expose:
            type: ingress
            tls:
              enabled: true
              certSource: secret
              secret:
                secretName: "wildcard-tls"
            ingress:
              controller: default
              hosts:
                core: msr4.example.url
          externalURL: msr4.example.url

Testing in child cluster

Get admin user password: 
kubectl get secret msr-harbor-core -n msr -o jsonpath="{.data.HARBOR_ADMIN_PASSWORD}" | base64 -d; echo

You can now access your MSR web UI at https://msr4.example.url.
